retrograde_check.Jupiter: RETROGRADE — depositor Mercury not RP, excluded

marriage.note: Love marriage: also check 5. Rahu on 7/7-CSL = unconventional.

job_change.note: Two-step: 1/10-CSL signifying 5/9 = inclination; then run new_job.

childbirth.note: Saturn/Ketu CSL on 5 = delay/denial; sub-sub crucial.

loan_borrow.note: Giving a loan: primary becomes 8, look for 11 (repaid).

foreign_settlement.note: 4 = homeland holds; 11 = gain at home keeps you.

lost_item.note: CSL sign gives direction of the item.
